summary.business_type: Legal Information & Salary Calculator Tool — Multi-jurisdiction (UK/US/AU/CA), YMYL category
top_findings: No Privacy Policy page — GDPR compliance gap on a site collecting contact information
No hreflang tags despite serving UK, US, AU, CA, and French-Canadian routes
No named legal reviewer on any YMYL employment law content
www subdomain serves duplicate content with no 301 redirect to non-www
Calculators are isolated islands — they do not link to guides, blog posts, or FAQ pages
quick_wins: Add 301 redirect www.mypayrights.com to mypayrights.com in Cloudflare (5 min)
Fix Article schema: author @type Organization to Person Jaspal Singh (5 min)
Add UK and 2026 to redundancy and tribunal calculator title tags (15 min)
Add meta descriptions to homepage and redundancy calculator (30 min)
Add legal disclaimer block to all blog posts and guides (30 min)
Add ClaudeBot explicitly to robots.txt (5 min)

bonus_scores.backlinks: INSUFFICIENT_DATA (domain age 2 days, zero backlinks expected)
